summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently, with no shared canonical. No close, merge, fix, or low-signal close actions are allowed by this job; focused or green PRs require maintainer judgment. Routed the exact linked security-sensitive PR to central security handling and kept unrelated PRs non-mutating.

actions.reason: Exact security-sensitive linked PR must be routed to central OpenClaw security triage; no ProjectClownfish mutation is allowed for this item.
Focused gateway/admin RPC behavior change with green evidence needs maintainer correctness review; this job cannot merge or fix.
Availability-affecting gateway shutdown behavior is a focused technical fix that needs maintainer judgment before any action.
Broad cron/progress feature has author-waiting state and cross-PR overlap; it is not safe to close or advance without maintainer review.
XL session-state hook feature with related hook PRs requires maintainer product and correctness judgment; merge/fix is not allowed in this job.
Likely low-signal docs/i18n change, but low-signal close is not enabled; keep open as an independent inventory item.
Focused media/session-state bug fix with linked issue and maintainer review gate requires maintainer technical judgment.
Auth-provider/provider-onboarding behavior is user-facing and technically sensitive; the job blocks fix/merge and requires maintainer correctness judgment.
Small focused accounting fix appears reviewable but needs maintainer technical approval; no merge/fix action is permitted.
Focused Codex usage accounting change is still waiting on author and needs maintainer correctness judgment before any closure or advancement.
Docs-only low-signal candidate should remain open as an independent inventory item because close_low_signal is not allowed in this job.

needs_human: #86913 needs maintainer review for a focused green gateway/admin RPC bug fix.
